citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: • Offer advice and information on finding a flat in the private sector • Set up flat viewings by calling estate agents on your behalf • Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries, or signpost you to a person or service to help you further
Please contact privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk with your enquiries.
ENSA Advice ... Please contact ENSA Advice on 0131 229 8791 to arrange an appointment or email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk

findings.text: The Private Accommodation Brochure describes a support service reachable via privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk and ENSA Advice via phone or email.
No emails, case notes, or records showing brochure provision or support service access by Anfal are present in the provided context.
Task requires email and case note records not included in this work order; cannot complete evidence search without those sources.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Brochure Provision / Support Service Access by Anfal

**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025)

**Findings:**
- The brochure describes a support service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk) and ENSA Advice (0131 229 8791 / ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk).
- No evidence in this context pack shows that Anfal received the brochure or contacted either service.

**Gap:** Emails, case notes, or other records documenting Anfal's receipt of the brochure or use of the support service are absent. A follow-up task is required to locate and review those records.
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence Map for Brochure Provision / Support Service Access

proposed_tasks.instructions: Locate and review email records and case notes from the matter napier-accommodation-arrears that document whether Anfal received the Private Accommodation Brochure (NAP-SRC-0014) or accessed the accommodation support service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk) or ENSA Advice. Search for communications to/from Anfal referencing the brochure, support service, or related queries. Report any evidence of provision, access, or referral.
proposed_tasks.title: Search email and case note records for brochure provision or support service access by Anfal

risk_flags.description: Critical evidence (emails, case notes) not provided; task cannot be completed without them.

summary: Task requires searching email and case note records for evidence that Anfal received the Private Accommodation Brochure or accessed the support service. Only source NAP-SRC-0014 (the brochure itself) was provided; no emails, case notes, or records of Anfal's interactions are in context. No evidence of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal can be found in the supplied materials. A follow-up task is proposed to locate and review the relevant email and case note records.

uncertainties.reason: No emails, case notes, or records of Anfal's interactions with the accommodation support service or brochure were supplied in the context pack.
